name: feat-ESE-21-6
title: Interactive demo — paint, carve, reset, debug overlays
description: Interactive browser demo combining all tilemap features. Mouse-driven tile painting, polygon carving tool, reset buttons, and toggleable debug overlays. Built as a standalone HTML page using Three.js directly.
acceptanceCriteria:
- Click to paint tiles (selectable tile type via keyboard 1-5)
- Carve mode: press C, move mouse, click to carve circle at cursor
- Reset: press R for full reset, E for empty reset
- Debug overlay toggle: press D
- Visual feedback for current mode (paint/carve) and selected tile
- All tile types from subtask 01 available
demoDeliverable: Screenshots showing: painting tiles, carving, and debug overlays.
testingScenarios:
- Paint tiles, verify placed
- Switch tile types, verify different shapes
- Carve tiles, verify density removed and collision edges update
- Reset to full, verify restored
- Toggle debug, verify overlays appear/disappear
stakeholderUnderstanding: Interactive demo showcasing all tilemap features.
